verbGlossary.SEGMENTED BY: {source} operations record or metric is broken down by {target} attribute for comparative analysis across project types or categories
verbGlossary.SCALED BY: {source} metric volume or magnitude scales proportionally with {target} attribute (e.g., headcount scales with building area)
verbGlossary.BENCHMARKED BY: {source} performance metric is compared across projects grouped by {target} to establish norms and outlier thresholds
verbGlossary.INFLUENCED BY: {source} operations outcome is affected by {target} attribute's conditions without being solely determined by it
verbGlossary.DRIVEN BY: {source} metric is primarily caused or determined by {target} attribute (e.g., weather delays driven by climate zone)
verbGlossary.GOVERNED BY: {source} follows procedures or requirements dictated by {target} attribute's contractual or regulatory terms
verbGlossary.REQUIRED BY: {source} is mandated because {target} attribute triggers a documentation or tracking requirement
verbGlossary.CONSTRAINED BY: {source} is limited by {target} attribute's conditions (e.g., workforce sourcing constrained by union requirements)
verbGlossary.REPORTED AS: {source} metric is surfaced as {target}-level performance attribute (e.g., peak daily headcount reported as peak workforce)
verbGlossary.COMPRESSED BY: {source} productivity timeline is shortened because {target} overlaps construction activities
verbGlossary.ROLLED INTO: {source}-level completion metric aggregates into {target}-level completion attribute
verbGlossary.TARGETED BY: {source} waste or environmental metric is measured against {target}
verbGlossary.ACTIVE DURING: {source} is generated while {target} maintains the target status attribute (e.g., daily logs active during construction status)
verbGlossary.GENERATED BY: {source} ticket is created because {target} attribute triggers T&M tracking for GC labor
verbGlossary.CONDITIONED BY: {source} weather record is contextualized by {target} expected weather patterns
verbGlossary.SEQUENCED BY: {source} work log entries are organized according to {target}d construction sequence
verbGlossary.CLOSES: {source} field documentation eliminates {target} by capturing real-time information from the jobsite before it becomes a formal gap
